_comment: Xorial default pipeline. The 'sequence' defines transitions between agents. Override 'skip', 'scopes', and 'custom_agents' in your project's .xorial/context/pipeline.json — do not copy 'sequence' there unless you need to change the order.
_scopes_comment: Define your project's app scopes here. Keys are scope names used in status.json 'scope' field. Values are paths relative to project root.
